zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Camville於大約1172年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾利爾布恩時，她的父親Walter de Camville26歲，母親Mrs. Walter Camville71歲。她於1183年與Thomas de Astley在英國諾薩普頓史爾克里克結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1240年9月之前在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Camville于大约1172年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾利爾布恩时，她的父亲Walter de Camville26岁，母亲Mrs. Walter Camville71岁。她于1183年与Thomas de Astley在英国諾薩普頓史爾克里克结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1240年9月之前在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Camville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French; English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in Calvados and Seine-Maritime named Carville, from the Scandinavian personal name Kári + Old French ville ‘settlement’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill, see Carroll .

variants.name: Carroll
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Cearbhaill or Mac Cearbhaill ‘descendant (or son) of Cearbhall’, a personal name perhaps based on cearbh ‘hacking’ and hence originally a byname for a butcher or a fierce warrior.
English and Scottish: variant of   Carrell  .

variants.name: Garfield
meanings: English (Midlands): topographic name from Middle English gor(e), gar(e) ‘triangular piece’ + feld ‘open country, field’ (Old English gār + feld), for someone who lived by a triangular piece of land.
English: alternatively, sometimes perhaps a variant of Carville (a name of Norman origin), with excrescent final -d.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Camville was born about 1172, in Lilbourne, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Walter de Camville, was 26 and her mother, Mrs. Walter Camville, was 71. She married Thomas de Astley in 1183, in Crick, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died before September 1240, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Camville est née environ 1172, à Lilbourne, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Camville, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Walter Camville, avait 71 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Astley en 1183, à Crick, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée avant septembre 1240, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Camville um 1172 in Lilbourne, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter de Camville 26 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Walter Camville 71. Sie hat 1183 in Crick, Northamptonshire, England Thomas de Astley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb vor September 1240 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Camville è nata il circa 1172 nel Lilbourne, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Walter de Camville, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Walter Camville, aveva 71 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Astley nel 1183, nel Crick, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del settembre 1240, nel England.

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Camville(이)가 대략 1172년 영국 노르섬프토실르 릴보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Camville(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Walter Camville(은)는 71세였다. 그녀는 1183년 영국 노르섬프토실르 크릭에서 Thomas de Astley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 9월 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Camville nasceu aproximadamente 1172, em Lilbourne, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Camville, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Walter Camville, tinha 71 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Camville родилась около 1172 г. в местности лилбурн, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter de Camville было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Walter Camville, 71. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Astley в 1183 г. в местности крикк, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла перед сентябрь 1240 г. в местности Англия.
